{ "code": 200, "message": "Sof Offer listed successfully", "data": [ { "id": 81, "lead_id": 68, "change_request_id": null, "foreign_id": 68, "foreign_id_type": "LEAD", "customer_id": 477, "reference_no": "211117-81", "service_order_date": "2021-11-16T19:00:00.000Z", "grace_period_days": 45, "contract_period": 24, "contract_period_unit": "Month", "billing_cycle": "Annually", "ntn": "", "term_condition": "

1.    The rates of the Services under this Service Order Form (“SOF”) as offered to the Customer by Trans World Associates (Private) Limited (the “Company”) shall be exclusive of taxes, duties, charges and levies which shall be applicable in accordance with the provisions of the Federal and Provincial laws, as the case may be. The Customer agrees to provide a National Tax Number (“NTN”) to the Company for taxation purposes and further agrees to duly and timely submit the applicable/relevant taxes to the Government of Pakistan (Federal or Provincial Government) as per prevailing rules and regulations.

 

2.    The Services under this SOF shall come into force from the date of link activation (the “Commencement Date”). The duration of the Services under this SOF shall be One (01) Year from the date of link activation of Services (hereinafter referred to as “Service Lock-In Period”). The Services shall thereafter automatically be renewed for a subsequent term of One (01) Year at the end of each Service period (the “Additional Term”) unless a written notice of termination of Services is received by the Company not later than thirty (30) days’ prior to completion of the Service Lock-In Period or any of the Additional Terms.

 

3.    With effect from the Commencement Date of the Services and during the Service Lock-In Period, the Customer agrees to waive its right to terminate or suspend the Services, nor shall it request the Company for a downgrade of the Services. Upon expiry of the Service Lock-In Period, TWA shall only review and process those requests for Service termination, suspension and downgrade which are received on a thirty (30) days advance written notice from the Customer.

 

4.    In the event of any change in the laws, regulations or Policies with respect to data or voice services issued by Pakistan Telecommunication Authority (the “Authority”), the Company shall implement the said changes and vary the terms and conditions of the Services under this SOF in accordance with the statutory timelines of the Authority and without any liabilities, as practicably possible, to the Customer. The Company shall endeavor to notify the Customer of any such variations in writing.

 

5.    First payment (NRC and first MRC) is due in advance before the activation of the Services.

 

6.    All payments due for the Services under this SOF shall be drawn in US Dollars or equivalent in Pakistani Rupees as per the interbank selling rate (“www.brecorder.com”) prevailing on the date of payment.

 

7.    The Company will bill the Customer for the Services immediately and forthwith from the Commencement Date. Invoices shall be issued to the Customer in advance. All payments are to be made by the Customer within and not later than fifteen (15) days of the invoice issuance date. If the Customer defaults in the payment, the Customer will be required to pay to the Company, an interest from the payment due date to the date of payment at the monthly rate of 1.5% on outstanding amounts.
